context: Tests whether the agent implements a tokenized, login-free review submission system with correct JWT expiry, pre-filled star rating, verified buyer marking, pending status, proper validation limits, and the photo incentive creation flow.

checklist.name: JWT-based token
checklist.description: generateReviewToken uses jwt.sign() (or equivalent JWT library) to create a signed token — NOT a plain string or UUID

checklist.name: Token 30-day expiry
checklist.description: The JWT payload sets an expiry of 30 days from creation (exp = now + 30 * 86400 or equivalent in seconds)

checklist.name: No login required
checklist.description: GET /review/:token handler does NOT check session, cookies, or Authorization headers for authentication — token alone is sufficient

checklist.name: Pre-filled rating
checklist.description: The form renderer reads a `rating` query parameter and passes it to the template as a pre-filled value (e.g., prefilledRating or equivalent)

checklist.name: Token verify on POST
checklist.description: POST /review/:token verifies the JWT token before processing submission, returning 400/401 on invalid/expired tokens

checklist.name: isVerifiedBuyer true
checklist.description: The created review record explicitly sets isVerifiedBuyer (or equivalent field) to true

checklist.name: Status pending
checklist.description: The created review record is saved with status 'pending' (not 'published' or 'approved' directly)

checklist.name: Rating validation 1–5
checklist.description: Submission rejects ratings outside the range 1–5 with a 400 error

checklist.name: Body min length validation
checklist.description: Submission rejects a body shorter than 10 characters with a 400 error

checklist.name: Title/body truncation
checklist.description: Title is truncated/limited to 100 characters AND body is truncated/limited to 2000 characters before saving

checklist.name: Photo incentive created
checklist.description: When photos are present, a pending incentive record is created with type 'percent_off' and value 15 (NOT immediately issued as a discount code)

checklist.name: Queue cancellation on submit
checklist.description: submitReview calls onReviewSubmitted (or equivalent) after saving, to cancel remaining review request queue jobs

checklist.name: Token expiry/invalid handled
checklist.description: GET /review/:token renders an error page (not a 500) when the token is invalid or expired
